name: restaurant-pos
description: Full Stack Restaurant POS — React + Node.js + MongoDB

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.seed: cd backend && node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const axios = require('axios'); axios.post('http://localhost:5000/api/auth/seed').then(r=>console.log(r.data)).catch(e=>console.error(e.message))"
